calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Citadel Re & Investments, LLC and Carl Le.
Dept. 514. Judge: A. James Robertson, II. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Jeffery P. Woo, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Stave Wang, (a/k/a Kai De Wang) who was placed under oath and testified, and for plaintiff Jenny Yu, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendants Citadel Re & Investments, LLC or Carl Le.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on October 3, 2017.
Defendant Citadel Re & Investments LLC's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 27, 2018.
Defendant Carl Le's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on April 30, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on June 6, 2018.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 14, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Steve Wang, (a/k/a Kai De Wang) and Jenny Yu, and against the defendants Citadel Re & Investments LLC and Carl Le, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $170,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest: $41,083.33.
Costs - Per Memorandum.

Total - $211,083.33.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Assigned To Trial Court
